title: Fermented Croatian Cabbage Bake
description: A healthy and flavorful dish featuring fermented cabbage, suitable for post-workout meals and following ayurvedic sattvic principles.
instructions: Chop the Chinese cabbage and onion into small pieces.
Mince the garlic and mix with cumin in a small bowl.
In a large bowl, combine the cabbage, onion, garlic-cumin mixture, and salt to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and cover with foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for another 15-20 minutes.
Allow the cabbage to cool and ferment at room temperature for 24-48 hours before refrigerating.
Before serving, top with chopped fresh herbs like parsley or dill, if desired.
Garnish with a lemon wedge, if desired.
Serve at room temperature or chilled, depending on your preference.
Store leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
Note: Fermentation time may vary depending on temperature and desired level of sourness.
Note: If using a glass jar, ensure it's sterilized before filling with the cabbage mixture, and store in the refrigerator to prevent contamination.
Note: Always check the cabbage for any signs of mold or spoilage before consuming it.
Note: For a stronger fermentation flavor, you can increase the fermentation time to 3-5 days.
Note: If you prefer a milder flavor, you can reduce the fermentation time to 12-24 hours.
